title: Research Data Analyst | M&E Professional
text:
👤 About Me



Research Data Analyst & Monitoring and Evaluation Professional with over three years’ experience in managing, analyzing, and reporting complex datasets across health research, child welfare, and USAID-funded programs.
Experienced in supporting studies involving 6,500+ beneficiaries, improving reporting efficiency by 40%, reducing manual data validation workload by 60%, and developing automated analytics solutions using R, R-Shiny, Python, Excel, KoboToolbox, and Power BI.
My work focuses on improving data quality, automating reporting systems, and building tools that support evidence-based decision-making in development programs.



🧠 Skills

Data Analysis & Programming - R (tidyverse, Shiny, ggplot2, highcharter) - Data cleaning & transformation - Statistical reporting
Monitoring & Evaluation - M&E frameworks - Indicator tracking systems - Data quality assessment
Data Tools - KoboToolbox - Excel advanced analytics - Git & GitHub (basic version control)
Visualization & Reporting - Interactive dashboards - Quarto & R Markdown reporting - Automated reporting systems

title: Dashboards
text:
Over time, I have developed several interactive dashboards using R (Shiny, bslib, tidyverse, ggplot2, and highcharter) to support Monitoring, Evaluation, Accountability, and Learning (MEAL) functions.
These dashboards transform raw program data into interactive insights that support:
- Real-time decision-making
- Case management tracking
- Data quality and performance monitoring
- Operational reporting and learning
The sections below highlight selected dashboards, their purpose, the problem they solved, outcomes, and the tools used.

title: Dashboards
text:
📊 OVC Program Dashboard

🔴 Live Dashboard



Problem Addressed
Data was fragmented across multiple Excel files, making it difficult to track beneficiaries, monitor case management progress, and identify service gaps in real time.
Outcome Achieved
⬆️ 65% improvement in real-time visibility of OVC caseload
⬆️ 50% faster identification of vulnerable households requiring follow-up
⬆️ Improved data-driven decision-making during monthly review meetings

title: Dashboards
text:
💼 Job Tracker Dashboard

🔴 Live Dashboard


Problem Addressed
I was not tracking my job applications at all. After applying for multiple roles, I had no structured way of knowing the status of each application or understanding how my applications were performing, especially since I rarely received feedback from employers.
Outcome Achieved
⬆️ 70% improvement in application tracking efficiency
⬆️ 60% reduction in missed follow-ups
⬆️ Clear visibility of my application pipeline from submission to outcome

title: Dashboards
section: 💼 Case Plan Readiness Achievement Tracker Dashboard
text:
💼 Case Plan Readiness Achievement Tracker Dashboard

📊 Dashboard Preview









Problem Addressed
The CPARA assessment data for OVC households was previously difficult to track and interpret in real time, making it challenging for teams to monitor progress, identify gaps, and follow up on case plan achievements effectively.

Outcome Achieved
⬆️ Improved real-time visibility of household assessment progress
⬆️ Faster identification of gaps and protection risks
⬆️ Enhanced data-driven decision-making for CPARA monitoring

title: R Toolkit Digest
text:
A collection of practical lessons learned while working with R for data analysis, visualization, and MEAL systems.
Each issue breaks down real-world techniques used in reporting, dashboards, and data transformation workflows.

title: R Toolkit Digest
text:
📚 Issues



📊 Issue 1

Small ggplot2 Tricks That Make Better Charts
Topics Covered - Grammar of Graphics
- geom_col()
- Fill aesthetics
- position_dodge()
A practical guide on improving the clarity and visual impact of bar charts in ggplot2.



  
    📥 Download PDF
  






📊 Issue 2

Understanding pivot_longer() and pivot_wider()
Topics Covered - Data reshaping in R
- Wide vs long formats
- tidyverse workflows

A practical guide on transforming datasets for analysis and visualization.
